intent: Plan via HF resolver: bare repo id, full HF URL, and gold: fixture shortcut

steps.intent: Terminal at prompt, ready to invoke the planner via the HF resolver
First invocation resolves a bare HF repo id (deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3) and renders the VRAM table with MLA attention at 4K seq
Second invocation resolves a full HF URL (https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3-70B) at 8K seq; table shows GQA/MHA architecture kind + VRAM breakdown
Third invocation uses the gold:deepseek-v3 fixture shortcut at 32K seq; MLA attention + VRAM breakdown + __EXIT_0__ sentinel
